values.value: Tests MDQ Static Bundle increase. Identifies bundle rows by querying CPQ_Option_Type__c for every data-line-id. Steps: (1) Year-1 edit propagates to all segments, (2) Year-N isolated edit changes only that segment. Saves. DB: asserts each bundle segment line's qty, then queries all Static Component lines on the quote (Segment_Index_Custom__c != null) and asserts each matches the expected bundle qty at that segment index with non-zero Revenue_Allocation__c. 3 scenarios.
